inputs.fcf_source: Normalized maintenance equity cash of approximately $180M divided by 123.456M economic units; 2026 growth capex is excluded from distributable owner cash but charged through the reinvestment assessment.
inputs.normalization_note: Merchant infrastructure — no regulated RAB. Maintenance capex estimated (~25% of growth capex); LLC/Class B structure means economic attribution is approximate. Q1 2026 run-rate Adj EBITDA ~$412M not used as starting FCF.
inputs.shares_source: Q1 2026 10-Q: 47,016,059 Class A plus 76,440,150 Class B/OpCo units

bear.notes: Volume softness, capex overruns, and slow deleveraging.

base.notes: 2026 build completes near budget and contracted volumes support moderate growth.

bull.notes: High water intensity, successful Speedway/Devon cohorts, and rapid deleveraging.

option_scan.question: Material options after scan?
option_scan.evidence: Operating compounder / croupier — Lawrence full cash-flow path sufficient

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

paths.label: Third-party approved (HK + Substacks + inventory)
paths.notes: Proxy: upside case when strategic third party has no spot IRR
paths.weight_why: Context-tier HK/Substacks until human promotes in third_party_sources.md; numeric proxy is weak.
weight_falsifiers: Using bull scenario as HK proxy when cross_check synthesis says no IRR upgrade
paths.hard_to_vary: no: proxy return is instrumentalist; prefer qualitative pp until approved blend

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

flags: Third-party numeric path proxies bull scenario (instrumentalist); HK cross-check says no base IRR upgrade. Prefer qualitative pp only until approved blend.

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

themes.label: AI compute -> power demand -> grid/water constraint -> scarce Permian surface

indicators.label: TPL water segment revenue (USD m, FY)

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

valuation.cross_check: Q1 2026 EBITDA was $102.9M on 2.5M bbl/d; merchant infrastructure is not a regulated rate base.

pricing_analysis.economic_claim_note: Each Class A share corresponds economically to one OpCo unit. Valuation uses 47.016 million Class A plus 76.440 million Class B/OpCo units. The prior Class-A-only denominator materially overstated consolidated free cash flow per listed share.
pricing_analysis.implied_growth_contract: Constant 7-year owner-cash growth with a 12x terminal owner-cash multiple; diagnostic, not forecast.
pricing_analysis.strongest_counter_explanation: The network may compound faster and with less risk than the model assumes because long-term dedications, MVCs, water intensity, and contiguous scale allow high-return brownfield expansion and rapid deleveraging after the 2026 build cycle.
falsifiers: Maintenance capital is demonstrated below $80M while 2026 EBITDA reaches or exceeds $465M.
Net leverage falls below 2.5x without reducing the contracted growth program.
Speedway and Devon cohorts earn incremental after-tax ROIC above 18% on disclosed capital.
pricing_analysis.pricing_conclusion: WaterBridge has valuable scale and contracted growth, but $34.46 is above the $26.51 base equity value and assumes successful execution of a $430M-$490M capital program with limited cost overruns. A base-case 15% entry price is materially lower; the current quote is a watch rather than an approval.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: Each Class A share corresponds economically to one OpCo unit. Valuation uses 47.016 million Class A plus 76.440 million Class B/OpCo units. The prior Class-A-only denominator materially overstated consolidated free cash flow per listed share.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: The complete additive component schedule includes operating assets, financial assets, debt or financing claims, minority interests where applicable, and realization reserves before division by the stated economic units.

economic_value_bridge.accounting_reference: The network includes approximately 2,500 miles of pipeline, 197 facilities, more than 4.5M bpd of capacity, and long-term dedications; tangible book value is not the primary valuation method.

component_groups.label: Existing produced-water network
component_groups.valuation_basis: $380M/$445M/$500M normalized EBITDA at 8x/10x/12x. A January 2025 Gravity Water transaction printed near 5.5x run-rate EBITDA, so WaterBridge's base requires a premium for scale, contracts, and network effects.
component_groups.overlap_control: The $10/$18/$28 per-share replacement-cost cross-check is embedded and never added to enterprise value.
component_groups.adjustments: Apply the production, contract, location, capital-intensity, ownership, timing, and realization adjustments described in _system/reviews/economic_value_comparable_audit_2026-07-15.md.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: The component low/base/high range or milestone driver explicitly risks realization; uncertainty widens the range rather than creating a zero.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Discounting, realization friction, and the component assumptions reflect the time required to contract, develop, or monetize the claim.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining owner-funded capital is deducted in the driver where disclosed; otherwise the range and realization reserve reflect the unresolved capital burden.

component_groups.label: Net debt
component_groups.valuation_basis: March 2026 debt principal less cash across all 123.456M economic units.
component_groups.overlap_control: Deducted once from network enterprise value.
component_groups.adjustments: Apply the production, contract, location, capital-intensity, ownership, timing, and realization adjustments described in _system/reviews/economic_value_comparable_audit_2026-07-15.md.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: The component low/base/high range or milestone driver explicitly risks realization; uncertainty widens the range rather than creating a zero.

risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining owner-funded capital is deducted in the driver where disclosed; otherwise the range and realization reserve reflect the unresolved capital burden.

component_groups.overlap_control: Offsets only project execution risk, not recurring maintenance capital already reflected in normalized owner cash.
component_groups.adjustments: Apply the production, contract, location, capital-intensity, ownership, timing, and realization adjustments described in _system/reviews/economic_value_comparable_audit_2026-07-15.md.

valuation_proof.evidence: 2026 adjusted EBITDA guidance is $425M-$465M. Values use $380M at 8x, $445M at 10x, and $500M at 12x.
valuation_proof.adjustment: Apply the production, contract, location, capital-intensity, ownership, timing, and realization adjustments described in _system/reviews/economic_value_comparable_audit_2026-07-15.md.
valuation_proof.overlap_control: The $10/$18/$28 per-share replacement-cost cross-check is embedded and never added to enterprise value.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Utilization, incremental after-tax return on capital, or contract economics fall below the low-case assumptions.

valuation_proof.evidence: March 2026 principal debt was $1.475B and cash was $50.7M.
valuation_proof.adjustment: Apply the production, contract, location, capital-intensity, ownership, timing, and realization adjustments described in _system/reviews/economic_value_comparable_audit_2026-07-15.md.
valuation_proof.overlap_control: Deducted once from network enterprise value.
valuation_proof.falsifier: The obligation, financing claim, tax, or realization friction is materially larger than the low-case reserve.

valuation_proof.economic_claim: Speedway, Devon, and contracted projects beyond 2026
valuation_proof.evidence: 2026 capex guidance is $430M-$490M and includes Speedway plus projects supporting a Devon agreement beginning in 2027.
valuation_proof.adjustment: Apply the production, contract, location, capital-intensity, ownership, timing, and realization adjustments described in _system/reviews/economic_value_comparable_audit_2026-07-15.md.
valuation_proof.overlap_control: 2026 guidance and projects already contributing to it stay in the core network.
valuation_proof.falsifier: The next decision milestone fails, remaining capital rises materially, or the stated success probability no longer fits observable progress.

risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Discounting, realization friction, and the component assumptions reflect the time required to contract, develop, or monetize the claim.

risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining owner-funded capital is deducted in the driver where disclosed; otherwise the range and realization reserve reflect the unresolved capital burden.

valuation_proof.evidence: Reserve for cost overruns, delayed in-service dates, and returns below the cost of capital on the $430M-$490M program.
valuation_proof.adjustment: Apply the production, contract, location, capital-intensity, ownership, timing, and realization adjustments described in _system/reviews/economic_value_comparable_audit_2026-07-15.md.
valuation_proof.overlap_control: Offsets only project execution risk, not recurring maintenance capital already reflected in normalized owner cash.
valuation_proof.falsifier: The obligation, financing claim, tax, or realization friction is materially larger than the low-case reserve.

valuation_proof.evidence: Pipelines, disposal capacity, rights-of-way, and permits provide an embedded asset floor but are already monetized by the core network.
valuation_proof.adjustment: Apply the production, contract, location, capital-intensity, ownership, timing, and realization adjustments described in _system/reviews/economic_value_comparable_audit_2026-07-15.md.
valuation_proof.overlap_control: The $10/$18/$28 per-share replacement-cost cross-check is embedded and never added to enterprise value.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Utilization, incremental after-tax return on capital, or contract economics fall below the low-case assumptions.

wisdom_applied: Marathon/Capital Returns: a large build program creates value only when incremental returns exceed the cost of capital.
Marks/Oaktree: leverage and refinancing claims are deducted before attributing network optionality to common units.
Hohn: density, long-term contracts, and brownfield expansion can create a moat, but maintenance and growth capital must be separated.
Groundbreaker context: local water scarcity supports terminal relevance; it does not convert a capital-intensive operator into a capital-free royalty company.
limitations: Public cohort-level capex and EBITDA data are insufficient to verify management's incremental return claims.
The Gravity Water transaction is smaller and less contracted than WaterBridge, while public midstream peers have different commodity, basin, and contract mixes.
Replacement cost is not liquidation value and can exceed economic value when capacity is underutilized.

component_groups.valuation_basis: $380M/$445M/$500M normalized EBITDA at 8x/10x/12x. A January 2025 Gravity Water transaction printed near 5.5x run-rate EBITDA, so WaterBridge's base requires a premium for scale, contracts, and network effects.
component_groups.overlap_control: The $10/$18/$28 per-share replacement-cost cross-check is embedded and never added to enterprise value.
component_groups.adjustments: Apply the production, contract, location, capital-intensity, ownership, timing, and realization adjustments described in _system/reviews/economic_value_comparable_audit_2026-07-15.md.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: The component low/base/high range or milestone driver explicitly risks realization; uncertainty widens the range rather than creating a zero.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Discounting, realization friction, and the component assumptions reflect the time required to contract, develop, or monetize the claim.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining owner-funded capital is deducted in the driver where disclosed; otherwise the range and realization reserve reflect the unresolved capital burden.

component_groups.label: Net debt
component_groups.valuation_basis: March 2026 debt principal less cash across all 123.456M economic units.
component_groups.overlap_control: Deducted once from network enterprise value.
component_groups.adjustments: Apply the production, contract, location, capital-intensity, ownership, timing, and realization adjustments described in _system/reviews/economic_value_comparable_audit_2026-07-15.md.

risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining owner-funded capital is deducted in the driver where disclosed; otherwise the range and realization reserve reflect the unresolved capital burden.

wisdom_applied: Marathon/Capital Returns: a large build program creates value only when incremental returns exceed the cost of capital.
Marks/Oaktree: leverage and refinancing claims are deducted before attributing network optionality to common units.
Hohn: density, long-term contracts, and brownfield expansion can create a moat, but maintenance and growth capital must be separated.
Groundbreaker context: local water scarcity supports terminal relevance; it does not convert a capital-intensive operator into a capital-free royalty company.
limitations: Public cohort-level capex and EBITDA data are insufficient to verify management's incremental return claims.
The Gravity Water transaction is smaller and less contracted than WaterBridge, while public midstream peers have different commodity, basin, and contract mixes.
Replacement cost is not liquidation value and can exceed economic value when capacity is underutilized.

valuation_method_route.label: Predictable cash-flow security
failure_modes: contract renewal or regulatory reset ignored
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
